description: Use this API to modify or add new harmonics impedance characteristics table data to the working case. This API is used to add new table of harmonic numbers and corresponding R/R0, L/L0 and C/C0 data points. This can be used to add a new data point of harmonic number, R/R0, L/L0 and C/C0 data to existing table. This can be used to change R/R0, L/L0 and C/C0 data points of existing harmonic number in the table. This API cannot be used to change table name and harmonic numbers. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_impchar(name, npts, har, rar, lar, car)
python_syntax: ierr = har_impchar(name, npts, har, rar, lar, car)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Harmonics impedance characteristics data table name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: npts
parameters.description: Number of data points specified in the table. (input).

parameters.name: har
parameters.description: An array of NPTS elements specifying array of ‘NPTS’ values specifying harmonic numbers. All the harmonic numbers in HAR array must be non zero. (input).

parameters.name: rar
parameters.description: An array of NPTS elements specifying array of ‘NPTS’ values specifying R/R0 ratio. (input).

parameters.name: lar
parameters.description: An array of NPTS elements specifying array of ‘NPTS’ values specifying L/L0 ratio. (input).

parameters.name: car
parameters.description: An array of NPTS elements specifying array of ‘NPTS’ values specifying C/C0 ratio. (input).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
